subcodes.first_line: Your call hath attained unto the honor of hearing, and the face of the Wronged One from the precincts of the Prison is turned towards thee. God willing, from the fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت بشرف اصغا فائز و وجه مظلوم از شطر سجن بانجناب متوجه انشاء الله از عرف
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @predictions and prophecies
